---
title: "PATH40060-Precision Oncology - Group Project
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-21"
---

```{r}
# ---- 1. Define gene list ----
genes_of_interest <- c(
  "VEGFA", "CA9", "BIRC5", "SLC2A1", "ADM", "PDK1",
  "PROM1", "CD44", "SOX2", "NANOG", "POU5F1",  # OCT4 = POU5F1
  "BDNF", "NLGN3", "DAB2IP"
)

# ---- 2. Load cBioPortal file ----
data <- read.delim("data_mrna_seq_v2_rsem_zscores_ref_all_samples.txt", comment.char = "#", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# ---- 3. Extract gene names ----
if ("Hugo_Symbol" %in% colnames(data)) {
  dataset_genes <- data$Hugo_Symbol
} else {
  dataset_genes <- rownames(data)
}

# ---- 4. Clean gene names ----
dataset_genes <- toupper(trimws(dataset_genes))
genes_of_interest <- toupper(genes_of_interest)

# ---- 5. Find genes ----
genes_found <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest %in% dataset_genes]
genes_missing <- setdiff(genes_of_interest, dataset_genes)

# ---- 6. Output results ----
cat("Genes found:\n")
print(genes_found)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(genes_missing)
```
